title: Hire Yourself, Inc.
description: Swipe your tiny CEO-self across a rooftop hiring lane, dodging incoming costs while stamping yourself into risky contracts for bigger scores.

howToPlayJson.title: Hire Yourself, Inc.
howToPlayJson.objective: Survive a 3-minute hiring spiral by dodging incoming hazards, collecting self-hire stamps, and cashing in short contract windows without getting buried by the business you created.

controls.outcome: Move your avatar between rooftop lanes to avoid incoming hazards.
Duck under flying paperwork and low drones for a brief moment.

controls.input: Swipe up through a glowing HIRE gate
controls.outcome: Enter a short risk/reward phase that boosts score multiplier if you keep dodging cleanly.

steps: Start as both the boss and the only employee on a three-lane rooftop office skyline.
Dodge incoming hazards such as payroll invoices, HR paperwork stacks, recruiter drones, and burnout clouds.
Collect floating self-hire stamps to build your combo meter.
Every few seconds a glowing HIRE YOURSELF gate appears; swiping up into it starts a 5-second contract window.
During a contract window, near-misses with hazards raise your multiplier faster, but each new hazard wave speeds up and lane patterns get w-
If you get hit three times, the company collapses and the run ends; your score can be posted to a simple offline local leaderboard.
howToPlayJson.scoring: Score rises from survival time, clean dodges, and collected self-hire stamps. Each stamp extends a combo. Entering a HIRE YOURSELF gate converts the combo into a multiplier window: near-misses are worth extra points, but
tips: Take HIRE gates only when the screen is crowded; the multiplier pays off most during dense waves.
Down-swipes are safer than panic lane changes when paperwork flies low.
Missing a stamp is fine; losing a hit point to force a combo is usually not.
Audio stingers can warn when a contract window is about to open and when wave speed steps up.
